stonetop.summary: Scoundrels, mercenaries, and treasure-hunters come north in search of a big score.

system.concept: Scoundrels, mercenaries, and treasure-hunters come north in search of a big score.
system.description: They make their way north now and then: scoundrels, mercenaries, treasure-hunters — folk who just can't make a go of a normal life. They show up in @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.uXlyry9CpXUz4ooR]{Marshedge} or @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.6yScslDfqrcCQ6CJ]{Stonetop} or @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.HesP5wBhjA0l9Ffk]{Gordin's Delve}, in search of some big score, or running from the consequences of the last one. Or both.
